{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Receptionist (Female)",
  "description": "Global Rainbowbird Partners - Our client, a reputable shipping and freight forwarding company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist (Female)

Job Location:&nbsp;Olodi-Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry:&nbsp;Shipping &amp; Freight Forwarding
Resumption:&nbsp;Immediate

Job Description


	We are&nbsp;seeking a&nbsp;smart, professional, gorgeous and well-presented Receptionist&nbsp;to manage front desk operations and create a positive first impression for clients and visitors.


Job Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to visitors in a courteous and professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and general inquiries
	Maintain a tidy and organized reception area
	Handle basic administrative and clerical duties
	Schedule appointments and coordinate meetings
	Support internal communication and office coordination.


Qualifications


	Minimum of&nbsp;a BSc qualification
	Prior experience in a receptionist or front desk role is an advantage
	Age Bracket: 30- 40.


Skills Required:


	Requirements: Classy, Smart, Intelligent, Courgeous,Presentable, &amp; Unmarried
	Excellent command of theEnglish Language(spoken and written)
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional appearance and positive attitude
	Good organizational and multitasking ability
	Proficiency in basic computer applications (MS Office).


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Interview
In-Person, On Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at Yaba, Lagos.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;grpmesg@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Receptionist (Female)&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only candidates who can maintain a high level of professionalism and represent the company effectively should apply.",

Receptionist (Female) Job at Global Rainbowbird Partners




        
    

        
        Global Rainbowbird Partners - Our client, a reputable shipping and freight forwarding company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist (Female)

Job Location: Olodi-Apapa, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Shipping & Freight Forwarding
Resumption: Immediate

Job Description


	We are seeking a smart, professional, gorgeous and well-presented Receptionist to manage front desk operations and create a positive first impression for clients and visitors.


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Welcome and attend to visitors in a courteous and professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and general inquiries
	Maintain a tidy and organized reception area
	Handle basic administrative and clerical duties
	Schedule appointments and coordinate meetings
	Support internal communication and office coordination.


Qualifications


	Minimum of a BSc qualification
	Prior experience in a receptionist or front desk role is an advantage
	Age Bracket: 30- 40.


Skills Required:


	Requirements: Classy, Smart, Intelligent, Courgeous,Presentable, & Unmarried
	Excellent command of theEnglish Language(spoken and written)
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional appearance and positive attitude
	Good organizational and multitasking ability
	Proficiency in basic computer applications (MS Office).


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Interview
In-Person, On Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at Yaba, Lagos.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Receptionist (Female)" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates who can maintain a high level of professionalism and represent the company effectively should apply.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Thryvve People Service - We are an&nbsp;HR services and recruitment firm,&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Social Media Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	You will manage day-to-day social media channels for all retainer clients including posting, scheduling, community management, and analytics.
	You must demonstrate keen attention to detail and uphold the highest quality standards in social media management.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage posting, scheduling, and community management across all client social platforms.
	Execute content calendars ensuring nothing is missed or delayed.
	Monitor and respond to comments and DMs in appropriate brand voice.
	Pull monthly analytics reports from native platforms.
	Support on-ground content capture during shoots and events.
	Maintain organized content libraries for each client account.


Non-Negotiables


	2-3 years of managing social media for brands (not personal accounts).
	Must have worked in a media agency with hands-on experience managing multiple brand accounts.
	Experience running multi-platform content calendars.
	Working knowledge of Meta Business Suite, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube.
	Portfolio showing work done for at least one commercial brand account.
	Understanding of basic social analytics: reach, impressions, engagement rate.
	Keen attention to detail and commitment to quality standards in social media management.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their send their CV and Portfolio to:&nbsp;recruitment@thryvvepeopleservices.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  },

Social Media Manager Job at Thryvve People Service




        
    

        
        Thryvve People Service - We are an HR services and recruitment firm, recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	You will manage day-to-day social media channels for all retainer clients including posting, scheduling, community management, and analytics.
	You must demonstrate keen attention to detail and uphold the highest quality standards in social media management.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage posting, scheduling, and community management across all client social platforms.
	Execute content calendars ensuring nothing is missed or delayed.
	Monitor and respond to comments and DMs in appropriate brand voice.
	Pull monthly analytics reports from native platforms.
	Support on-ground content capture during shoots and events.
	Maintain organized content libraries for each client account.


Non-Negotiables


	2-3 years of managing social media for brands (not personal accounts).
	Must have worked in a media agency with hands-on experience managing multiple brand accounts.
	Experience running multi-platform content calendars.
	Working knowledge of Meta Business Suite, TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube.
	Portfolio showing work done for at least one commercial brand account.
	Understanding of basic social analytics: reach, impressions, engagement rate.
	Keen attention to detail and commitment to quality standards in social media management.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their send their CV and Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "DET Consulting &amp; Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals.

Our mission is simple: Empowering people, transforming businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Wealth Manager

job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Primary role is to grow the assets and liabilities of the Financial Institutions Department in general and in the Insurance and Pensions Funds industries in particular
	Ensure the deepening of existing customer names in the Bank&rsquo;s books
	Generate new business in the target market
	Develop strategies to attend to customer complaints as to foster customer retention and attend to all correspondences pertaining to the Unit
	Regularly appraise the activities and functions of the Unit and make recommendations for improvement to the Department Head and Divisional Head
	Perform other duties as assigned by Head Financial Institutions &amp; Wealth Management.


Key Performance Indicators


	Revenue of accounts managed as measured by Fincon
	Business volume growth rate: Deposit and Loans
	Percentage [%] of variance in budgeted revenue
	Quality of credit portfolio
	Number of new HNI relationship won within the period
	Customer satisfaction index
	Numbers of Accounts lost within the period
	Numbers of complaints received on the accounts during the period.


Minimum Educational Qualifications


	First Degree or its equivalent
	Post Graduate Qualifications:&nbsp;Relevant Masters&rsquo; degree will be an advantage
	Professional Qualifications:&nbsp;ACCA, ICAN, CIIN, CITN and/or CFA as well as SEC Certification will be an added advantage.


Previous Work Experience Requirements:


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a Tier 1 bank with at least 2 years&rsquo; experience in Financial related institution, in a market-facing role.
	Experience in a non-bank financial institution would be beneficial.


Salary
N750,000 - N900,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio&nbsp;to:&nbsp;info.detconsultingltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Wealth Manager Job at DET Consulting & Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        DET Consulting & Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals.

Our mission is simple: Empowering people, transforming businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Wealth Manager

job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties & Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Primary role is to grow the assets and liabilities of the Financial Institutions Department in general and in the Insurance and Pensions Funds industries in particular
	Ensure the deepening of existing customer names in the Bank’s books
	Generate new business in the target market
	Develop strategies to attend to customer complaints as to foster customer retention and attend to all correspondences pertaining to the Unit
	Regularly appraise the activities and functions of the Unit and make recommendations for improvement to the Department Head and Divisional Head
	Perform other duties as assigned by Head Financial Institutions & Wealth Management.


Key Performance Indicators


	Revenue of accounts managed as measured by Fincon
	Business volume growth rate: Deposit and Loans
	Percentage [%] of variance in budgeted revenue
	Quality of credit portfolio
	Number of new HNI relationship won within the period
	Customer satisfaction index
	Numbers of Accounts lost within the period
	Numbers of complaints received on the accounts during the period.


Minimum Educational Qualifications


	First Degree or its equivalent
	Post Graduate Qualifications: Relevant Masters’ degree will be an advantage
	Professional Qualifications: ACCA, ICAN, CIIN, CITN and/or CFA as well as SEC Certification will be an added advantage.


Previous Work Experience Requirements:


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in a Tier 1 bank with at least 2 years’ experience in Financial related institution, in a market-facing role.
	Experience in a non-bank financial institution would be beneficial.


Salary
N750,000 - N900,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Audit Specialist",
  "description": "Lily Hospitals Limited, established since 1986, remains one of the foremost hospitals in Nigeria and within the South-South region of the country. It is the first private hospital in Nigeria to achieve ISO 9001:2000 quality management system certification from the Standards Organization of Nigeria (SON). Also, we are consistently committed to high standards, continuous improvement, service excellence, organizational citizenship, and outstanding work ethics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Audit Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The successful candidates will support the organization&rsquo;s internal audit, risk management, and compliance functions by conducting audits, reviewing operational processes, and ensuring adherence to established policies and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct financial, operational, and compliance audits across departments
	Review internal controls and identify process gaps or risks
	Prepare audit reports with findings and actionable recommendations
	Monitor implementation of corrective actions
	Ensure compliance with internal policies, industry regulations, and statutory requirements
	Support fraud risk assessments and investigations where required


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field
	4&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in internal audit, risk, or compliance
	Must possess professional certification (ACA, ACCA, CIA or equivalent)
	Strong analytical, reporting, and problem-solving skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and audit documentation.


Benefits


	Competitive salary
	Health insurance
	Structured work environment
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@lilyhospitals.net&nbsp;using &quot;Internal Audit Specialist&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted Candidates will be contacted.",

Internal Audit Specialist Job at Lily Hospitals Limited




        
    

        
        Lily Hospitals Limited, established since 1986, remains one of the foremost hospitals in Nigeria and within the South-South region of the country. It is the first private hospital in Nigeria to achieve ISO 9001:2000 quality management system certification from the Standards Organization of Nigeria (SON). Also, we are consistently committed to high standards, continuous improvement, service excellence, organizational citizenship, and outstanding work ethics.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Audit Specialist

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The successful candidates will support the organization’s internal audit, risk management, and compliance functions by conducting audits, reviewing operational processes, and ensuring adherence to established policies and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct financial, operational, and compliance audits across departments
	Review internal controls and identify process gaps or risks
	Prepare audit reports with findings and actionable recommendations
	Monitor implementation of corrective actions
	Ensure compliance with internal policies, industry regulations, and statutory requirements
	Support fraud risk assessments and investigations where required


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field
	4–5 years of relevant experience in internal audit, risk, or compliance
	Must possess professional certification (ACA, ACCA, CIA or equivalent)
	Strong analytical, reporting, and problem-solving skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and audit documentation.


Benefits


	Competitive salary
	Health insurance
	Structured work environment
	Opportunities for professional development and career growth.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Internal Audit Specialist" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted Candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Customer Service / Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Paceview Homes Limited -&nbsp;We develop and construct it to Suit Your Needs, We focus on integrating technology and automation into residential and commercial real estate using sustainable methods. The paceview homesbrand is a guarantee of integrity, professionalism, and reliable housing Development suitable for all classes.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service / Front Desk Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
	Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
	Communicating with customers through various channels.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Knowing our products inside and out so that you can answer questions.
	Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
	Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
	Managing a team of junior customer service representatives.
	Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.


Requirements


	High School Diploma, general education degree, or equivalent, with 5-7 years of experience.
	Ability to stay calm when customers are stressed or upset.
	Comfortable using computers.
	N.B 5% commision on sales / converted prospect to client is also inclusive.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruit@paceviewhomes.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Customer Service / Front Desk Officer Job at Paceview Homes Limited




        
    

        
        Paceview Homes Limited - We develop and construct it to Suit Your Needs, We focus on integrating technology and automation into residential and commercial real estate using sustainable methods. The paceview homesbrand is a guarantee of integrity, professionalism, and reliable housing Development suitable for all classes.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service / Front Desk Officer
Job Location:  Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
	Responding promptly to customer inquiries.
	Communicating with customers through various channels.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Knowing our products inside and out so that you can answer questions.
	Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
	Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
	Managing a team of junior customer service representatives.
	Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.


Requirements


	High School Diploma, general education degree, or equivalent, with 5-7 years of experience.
	Ability to stay calm when customers are stressed or upset.
	Comfortable using computers.
	N.B 5% commision on sales / converted prospect to client is also inclusive.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
